# Release-Readiness Checklist

## Summary

- Product or feature:
- Release owner:
- Durable team:
- Target release date:
- Current lifecycle gate: Release Readiness

## Evidence Gates

- [ ] Concept Fit evidence exists.
- [ ] Problem-Solution Fit evidence exists.
- [ ] Identity compatibility evidence exists where runtime identity names or persisted role labels changed.
- [ ] Investment Case is approved or explicitly waived.
- [ ] Build Readiness artifacts are complete.

## Quality

- [ ] Automated tests cover critical paths.
- [ ] Manual smoke checks are documented.
- [ ] Known defects are triaged.
- [ ] Rollback path is documented.

## Security, Privacy, And Compliance

- [ ] Threat model complete or risk accepted.
- [ ] Dependency and package risk reviewed.
- [ ] Secrets handling reviewed.
- [ ] Privacy review complete or not applicable.
- [ ] SBOM or dependency inventory available if required.

## Accessibility

- [ ] Keyboard path checked.
- [ ] Screen-reader impact considered.
- [ ] Color and contrast checked where UI exists.
- [ ] Accessibility exceptions are documented.

## Operability

- [ ] SLO or service-health expectation defined.
- [ ] Telemetry exists for adoption and failure.
- [ ] Runbook exists.
- [ ] Support handoff complete.
- [ ] Incident response owner identified.

## Decision

- [ ] Approve release
- [ ] Approve limited rollout
- [ ] Block release

## Follow-Up

- Hypercare owner:
- Review date:
- Post-launch learning review date:
